description: Particle dynamics and curvilinear motion; force and momentum; rotational dynamics and angular momentum; kinetic and potential energy; special relativity.
preAndCorequisites:
• Complete 1 of the following
    • 1.5 units of 100-level PHYS
    • Completed Physics 12 with a minimum grade of B (73%)
preOrCorequisites:
• Completed or concurrently enrolled in 1 of:
    • MATH100 - Calculus I (1.5)
    • MATH109 - Introduction to Calculus (1.5)
supplementalNotes:
• Credit will be granted for only one of PHYS 120, PHYS 110, PHYS 122.
  • Credit will be granted for only PHYS 112 (3.0 units) or two of PHYS 120, PHYS 130, PHYS 122, PHYS 125 (1.5 units each).
  • An enriched course in physics primarily intended for students who are planning a career in Physics or Astronomy.
  • This course may include tours of local physics research institutions.
title: Physics I
